title: Bead-free Long Fragment LSK109 Library Preparation
author: John Tyson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7eshjee
materials: Quantify 1 µL of the DNA sample using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery and then set up the following End-Prep reaction: 50 µL DNA sample 7 µL Ultra II End-Prep Buffer (NEB) 3 µL Ultra II End-Prep Enzyme mix (NEB)

steps.title: 10 µg of HMW genomic DNA...
steps.instruction: 10 µg of HMW genomic DNA in 51 µL of EB was either used unsheared or sheared (see previous protocols).

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:30:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:30:00 followed by 65 °C for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 60 µL of a PEG/NaCl...
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL of a PEG/NaCl precipitation buffer [9 % PEG8000 (w/v), 1 Molarity (M) NaCl, 10 Molarity (M) Tris-Cl (pH8.0)] and mixed by flicking tube.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and wash 2x with...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and wash 2x with 200 µL of 70 % ethanol by simple addition to the inside of the tube wall and centrifuging for 00:05:00 followed by removal. Be careful to avoid pelleted DNA when doing this (you may not see DNA so keep away from appropriate area of tube).

steps.title: Allow DNA to air dry for a couple of mins
steps.instruction: Allow DNA to air dry for a couple of mins.

steps.title: Leave DNA in fridge to resuspend overnight
steps.instruction: Leave DNA in fridge to resuspend overnight. Depending on DNA fragment size time can be shortened.

steps.title: Mix DNA by flicking and quantify...
steps.instruction: Mix DNA by flicking and quantify 1 µL using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery and then set up the following Ligation reaction: 33.5 µL DNA sample 12.5 µL LNB buffer 2 µL AMX adapter 2 µL Quick T4 DNA Ligase (NEB)

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C / Room temperature for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C / Room temperature for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Add 4
steps.instruction: Add 4.4 µL 5 Molarity (M) NaCl.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 13500 rpm for 00:30:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 13500 rpm for 00:30:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Remove supernatant and wash 2x with...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and wash 2x with 200 µL of a 2 fold dilution of the previously used PEG/NaCl precipitation buffer above. Do not disturb the pellet and centrifuge for 00:05:00 between each addition before removing wash solution.

steps.title: Add 26 µL EB buffer (10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 26 µL EB buffer (10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8.0).

steps.title: Leave adapted DNA in fridge to resuspend overnight
steps.instruction: Leave adapted DNA in fridge to resuspend overnight. Depending on DNA fragment size time can be shortened.

steps.title: Mix DNA by flicking and quantify...
steps.instruction: Mix DNA by flicking and quantify 1 µL using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery.

steps.title: [Possible round of size selection with...
steps.instruction: [Possible round of size selection with Circulomics / PEG-NaCl buffer (see figure above).]

steps.title: Library ready to be combined with...
steps.instruction: Library ready to be combined with SQB for loading onto flowcell ( 400 ng – 1.3 µg depending on size and recovery).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13500 rpm for 00:30:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13500 rpm for 00:30:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Add 41 µL EB buffer (10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 41 µL EB buffer (10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8.0).

steps.title: Mix by flicking
steps.instruction: Mix by flicking.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature to precipitate the DNA
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature to precipitate the DNA.
